channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Suitcase dumped next to bin, 28th April
item.description:
Large maroon coloured suitcase flytipped by public bin on Parish Lane, near bus stop at junction with Penge Lane

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parish Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wheel dumped, 28th April
item.description:
Saw a man dump a wheal over on our street from the big block of flats. Near electric unit.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Versailles Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree needs pruning back to prevent bird mess., 28th April
item.description:
Tree needs pruning back to prevent bird mess
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Leechcroft Avenue, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter /fly tipping, 28th April
item.description:
Someone appears to have set up a ‘camp’ yesterday . The photos show the state of the pavement today !!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Castle Road, North Finchley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Internet cable cut o/s 118 Welling Way, Welling, 28th April
item.description:
Internet cable cut o/s 118 Welling Way, Welling - caller says that the guy with strimmer has cut through his internet cable....res wants this rectified
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 118, Welling Way, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Post leaning over with danger of collapsing and door coming open, 28th April
item.description:
Live there on bus route
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Love Lane, West Thurrock

item.title: Spray cans abandoned, 28th April
item.description:
Spray cans abandoned Not sure if they contain saying toxic

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Holligrave Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street and area not cleaned, 28th April
item.description:
No litter picking or sweeping has been done for weeks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Jasmine Grove, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 28th April
item.description:
There is still an abandoned vehicle with no valid m.o.t parked outside number 37,da7 5ss.could this vehicle please b removed as it belongs to no one on the street and may have been stolen and dumped.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): First Avenue, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 28th April
item.description:
Hello. I would like to report excessive litter/fly tipping outside our property. This includes a mattress, an old television. Etc. I have been out myself with rubber gloves to put excess bin bags into wheelie bins where I can.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Finsbury Park Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge,deep pothole., 28th April
item.description:
There is a huge,deep pothole as you come round from inverine road into delafield road.the pothole it is very hard to avoid and nearly damaged my tyre.please fill this in as a matter of urgency,thankyou
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Delafield Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree needs pruning causing damage to garden wall, 28th April
item.description:
Tree roots not properly set into ground normally. The tree has roots that are damaging my garden wall and cracking to plaster inside house. Request URGENT pruning of this tree.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Samos Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside of 93, between cafe and furniture shop, blocking pavement, has been kicked towards shop to clear pavement, 28th April
item.description:
Homeless man has been and gone. left lots of stuff behind including sheets etc, area smells of urine needs jet wash too please.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cricklewood Broadway, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: E-bikes, 28th April
item.description:
Loads of lime and forest bikes on the pavement outside the mcdonalds,but on council pavement not private ground.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Peninsular Park Road, Charlton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 44, 28th April
item.description:
Sunkwnntrench collates and leaks water 5 th time reporting please take action
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41, Ferncroft Avenue, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: David miller 27.4.26 Railings damaged by p3, f/up req, see photo., 28th April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 241, Croydon Road, Elmers End, Greater London

item.title: Mattress left, very overgrown area, 28th April
item.description:
There's rubbish in the area, especially in the grass. Recently a mattress was dumped. There over grown trees.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Birchdene Drive, Thamesmead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned overflowing black bin, 28th April
item.description:
This abandoned bin has been here for some weeks now, overflowing with dog doo bags and various rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bouverie Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal Waste Outside 65-69 East Road., 28th April
item.description:
Outside 65-69 East Road, there's still been illegal dumping of rubbish outside the building's door. This has impacted the occupants ability to enter and leave the building. This has been here for just under a month, and were looking for it to be cleaned.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nile Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working, 28th April
item.description:
Top of spring shaw Road in cul de sac street light not working. Very dark and dangerous
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 46, Breakspears Drive, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
